pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup scripts that download the official OpenToonz sample data and place the dwanko_run.tnz file at this location.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which prepares this exact directory for task output and verifier.py which checks it.
Task description explicitly requests exactly 640x480 resolution, and verifier.py enforces width == 640.
Task description explicitly requests exactly 640x480 resolution, and verifier.py enforces height == 480.
Verifier.py code logic enforces 'min_count <= file_count' where min_count defaults to 10.
Verifier.py code logic enforces 'file_count <= max_count' where max_count defaults to 14.
Task description strictly instructs to render 'ONLY frames 1 through 12 (inclusive)'.
Verifier.py specifically checks if 'size_kb >= 100' for points.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires rendering exactly frames 1-12 of the dwanko_run.tnz sample scene at exactly 640x480 resolution. The original scene is an official OpenToonz sample containing 72 frames with a default resolution of 1920x1080 (16:9). The verifier strictly requires the 640x480 output dimension and allows a frame count between 10 and 14 to pass, while requiring the outputs to reside in /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/retro_vga and have a total size of at least 100 KB.
